dashboard_alerts.title: Scheduled Server Upgrade
dashboard_alerts.message: We are performing a major system upgrade on Sunday at 02:00 UTC. Streaming may experience temporary interruptions.

dashboard_alerts.title: Hi-Fi Audio is Here!
dashboard_alerts.message: Lossless audio streaming is now active for all desktop and mobile listeners. Tap to explore our new catalog.

announcement_popup.title: Welcome to Musee Client!
announcement_popup.message: Experience high-fidelity, smooth, local-cached music playback. This custom build features advanced hardware integration.

features.title: Remote Config Engine
features.description: Dynamic banners, popups, and update prompts without installing a new app build.

features.title: Silent Windows Updates
features.description: Background installer execution with clean host process termination to avoid locked files.

features.title: Dashboard Cards
features.description: Sleek Spotify-style warnings, notifications, and alerts integrated cleanly into your feed.

message_of_the_day.message: 🎧 'Where words fail, music speaks.' — Enjoy your listening session on Musee today!
